languages.original_text: "Your debate technique is highly... unconventional. In which case, I suggest we conclude our disputation — you have already given me sufficient food for thought." {n}Eogunn pensively twists a piston in his beard.{/n}

languages.text: "Ваша техника ведения дискуссии весьма... неконвенциональна. В таком случае предлагаю на этом закончить — вы уже подали мне достаточно пищи для размышлений". {n}Эоганн задумчиво покручивает пистон на бороде.{/n}

"Your debate technique is highly... unconventional. In which case, I suggest we conclude our disputation — you have already given me sufficient food for thought." {n}Eogunn pensively twists a piston in his beard.{/n}

languages.text: «Sus técnicas de debate son muy... poco convencionales. Siendo así, sugiero concluir esta conversación; ya me ha dado suficientes cosas sobre las que reflexionar». {n}Eogunn mesa un pistón de su barba, pensativo.{/n}

languages.text: “您的辩论技巧……相当特别。既然如此，我建议我们到此为止——您已经给了我足够多的思考素材。”{n}伊奥贡若有所思地拨弄着胡须里的一根活塞。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Your debate technique is highly... unconventional. In which case, I suggest we conclude our disputation — you have already given me sufficient food for thought." {n}Eogunn pensively twists a piston in his beard.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “您的辩论技巧……相当特别。既然如此，我建议我们到此为止——您已经给了我足够多的思考素材。”{n}伊奥贡若有所思地拨弄着胡须里的一根活塞。{/n}

languages.text: « Votre technique de débat est très... inhabituelle. Je vous suggère donc que nous mettions un terme à cet échange ; vous m'avez donné suffisamment matière à réflexion. » {n}Eogunn joue pensivement avec un piston de sa barbe.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Your debate technique is highly... unconventional. In which case, I suggest we conclude our disputation — you have already given me sufficient food for thought." {n}Eogunn pensively twists a piston in his beard.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Votre technique de débat est très... inhabituelle. Je vous suggère donc que nous mettions un terme à cet échange ; vous m'avez donné suffisamment matière à réflexion. » {n}Eogunn joue pensivement avec un piston de sa barbe.{/n}

languages.text: "Eure Diskussionstechnik ist äußerst ... unkonventionell. Deshalb schlage ich vor, unseren Disput zu beenden ... Ihr habt mir schon genug Stoff zum Nachdenken geliefert." {n}Eogunn dreht nachdenklich an einem Kolben in seinem Bart.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Your debate technique is highly... unconventional. In which case, I suggest we conclude our disputation — you have already given me sufficient food for thought." {n}Eogunn pensively twists a piston in his beard.{/n}

languages.text: 「あなたのディベートのテクニックは非常に...型破りですね。そうであるならば、この論争は終わりにしよう。」{n}エオガンは物思いにふけり、髭のピストンをひねる。{/n}

languages.text: "Tartışma tekniğiniz oldukça... Alışılmadık. Bu durumda tartışmamızı sonlandırmamızı öneriyorum. Bana zaten yeterince düşünme malzemesi verdiniz." {n}Eogunn, düşünceli bir şekilde sakalındaki bir pistonu büküyor.{/n}
